description: You are a power subsystem engineer at an Earth-observation satellite company. Before the Preliminary Design Review (PDR), you must verify that the 20 Ah battery baselined for the SkyWatch-3 mission can sustain the 285 W spacecraft bus through the worst-case eclipse. Using the spacecraft and power subsystem specification at ~/Desktop/skywatch3_power_spec.txt, determine the eclipse profile over 30 days for the SkyWatch-3 orbit and analyze the maximum eclipse duration. Write the analysis report to ~/GMAT_output/eclipse_analysis_report.txt including the fields: num_eclipses, max_eclipse_min, avg_eclipse_min, eclipse_fraction, required_Wh, margin_percent, and battery_adequate. Save the simulation script to ~/GMAT_output/skywatch3_eclipse.script. Login: username=ga, password=password123
